items.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs post second straight weekly inflows for first time in 5 months
items.summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded their second consecutive week of net inflows, ending a five-month outflow streak.
items.title_cn: 现货比特币ETF连续第二周资金净流入，为五个月来首次
items.summary_cn: 美国现货比特币ETF录得连续第二周资金净流入，结束了持续五个月的流出态势。

items.title: Bitcoin ‘bull trap’ forming as bear market enters middle phase: Willy Woo
items.summary: On-chain analyst Willy Woo said Bitcoin’s current price range likely hasn’t bottomed yet, warning that the market could see further downside before a true cycle low forms.
items.title_cn: Willy Woo：比特币'牛市陷阱'正在形成，熊市进入中期阶段
items.summary_cn: 链上分析师Willy Woo表示，比特币当前价格区间可能尚未触底，并警告市场在形成真正的周期低点前可能进一步下跌。

items.title: Strategy's STRC stock trading surge: How much Bitcoin can Saylor buy?
items.summary: Strategy may raise $300 million via STRC sales, potentially giving Michael Saylor enough proceeds to continue buying Bitcoin throughout 2026.
items.title_cn: Strategy公司STRC股票交易激增：Saylor还能买入多少比特币？
items.summary_cn: Strategy公司可能通过STRC销售筹集3亿美元，这或许能让Michael Saylor有足够资金持续买入比特币直至2026年。

items.title: Bitcoin dip may not be over as retail ramps up buying below $70K: Santiment
items.summary: Bitcoin whales have sold about 66% of the Bitcoin they recently accumulated since Wednesday, according to crypto sentiment platform Santiment.
items.title_cn: Santiment：比特币跌势或未结束，散户在7万美元下方加速买入
items.summary_cn: 加密情绪平台Santiment数据显示，自周三以来，比特币鲸鱼已卖出近期积累的约66%的比特币。

items.title: When buying Bitcoin, don’t expect profit for at least 3 years: Data
items.summary: Bitcoin’s price volatility tends to scare off buyers, but data shows investors who hold for at least three years have a higher chance of locking in significant returns.
items.title_cn: 数据显示：买入比特币后，至少持有三年才可能获利
items.summary_cn: 比特币价格波动性常吓退买家，但数据显示，持有至少三年的投资者更有可能锁定可观回报。

items.title: Ether’s path to $2.5K may be trickier than expected: Here’s why
items.summary: Crypto markets spent the week chasing green, but Ether’s rally toward $2,500 might hit significant setbacks. Cointelegraph explains why.
items.title_cn: 以太坊升至2500美元之路可能比预期更曲折：原因如下
items.summary_cn: 加密市场本周追逐上涨，但以太坊向2500美元的反弹可能遭遇重大挫折。Cointelegraph解释了原因。

items.title: Ether traders see ‘larger bounce’ after ETH price taps $2.2K
items.summary: Ether traders said ETH price could see further upside as long as bulls defended the $2,100 support, fueled by renewed demand.
items.title_cn: 以太坊交易员：ETH价格触及2200美元后或迎来'更大反弹'
items.summary_cn: 以太坊交易员表示，只要多头守住2100美元支撑位，ETH价格可能进一步上涨，这得益于需求复苏。

items.title: Ethereum smart accounts are finally coming ‘within a year’ — Vitalik Buterin
items.summary: Removing intermediaries with account abstraction is a “core principle of non-ugly cypherpunk Ethereum,” said Buterin.
items.title_cn: Vitalik Buterin：以太坊智能账户终将'在一年内'到来
items.summary_cn: Buterin表示，通过账户抽象消除中间人是'非丑陋密码朋克以太坊的核心原则'。

items.title: Magic Eden winds down EVM, Bitcoin NFT markets to focus on gambling
items.summary: Magic Eden is shifting resources from NFTs to its casino platform Dicey, after a closed beta saw $15 million wagered by around 200 users in two months.
items.title_cn: Magic Eden关闭EVM和比特币NFT市场，专注赌博业务
items.summary_cn: Magic Eden正将资源从NFT转向其赌博平台Dicey，此前封闭测试中约200名用户在两个月内下注1500万美元。

items.title: AI ‘vibe coding’ could put Ethereum roadmap ahead of schedule: Vitalik Buterin
items.summary: Vitalik Buterin says AI coding still has “massive caveats,” but people should expect Ethereum’s roadmap to be finished much faster than expected.
items.title_cn: Vitalik Buterin：AI'氛围编码'或使以太坊路线图提前完成
items.summary_cn: Vitalik Buterin表示AI编码仍有'巨大缺陷'，但人们应预期以太坊路线图将比预期快得多地完成。

items.title: Latam Insights: Paraguay to Mine Bitcoin With Seized Hardware, Colombia Prepares Crypto Regulation
items.summary: Welcome to Latam Insights, a compilation of the most relevant crypto news from Latin America over the past week. In this edition, Paraguay seeks to implement seized hardware to mine bitcoin, Colombia prepares to regulate the crypto industry, and Uala raises $195 million to expand throughout Latin America. Paraguay to Leverage Seized ASICs to Mine […]
items.title_cn: 拉美洞察：巴拉圭拟用没收硬件挖比特币，哥伦比亚准备加密监管
items.summary_cn: 欢迎阅读拉美洞察，这是过去一周拉丁美洲最相关加密新闻的汇编。本期内容包括：巴拉圭寻求利用没收硬件挖比特币，哥伦比亚准备监管加密行业，以及Uala筹集1.95亿美元以扩张拉美业务。

items.title: Brazil’s Pix Payment Network Launches in Argentina, Bank Mulls Larger Expansion
items.summary: Banco do Brasil, a Brazilian state-controlled bank, launched a new feature allowing Brazilian customers to leverage the Pix payments system in Argentina. The institution is considering expanding this functionality to more countries to reach large Brazilian communities. Brazil’s Pix Payments Expand to Argentina Through Banco do Brasil Pix, the Brazilian signature rapid payments network, is […]
items.title_cn: 巴西Pix支付网络在阿根廷上线，银行考虑更大规模扩张
items.summary_cn: 巴西国有银行Banco do Brasil推出一项新功能，允许巴西客户在阿根廷使用Pix支付系统。该机构正考虑将此功能扩展到更多国家，以覆盖大型巴西社区。

items.title: Nexo Expands to Argentina to Redefine Digital Dollar Savings
items.summary: Digital asset platform Nexo officially launches in Argentina following its acquisition of Buenbit to offer high-yield savings and crypto-backed credit. Global digital asset wealth platform Nexo established its regional hub in Buenos Aires on March 5, 2026. The expansion introduces a digital dollar savings alternative allowing local users to earn up to 13% annual interest […]
items.title_cn: Nexo扩张至阿根廷，重新定义数字美元储蓄
items.summary_cn: 数字资产平台Nexo在收购Buenbit后正式在阿根廷推出，提供高收益储蓄和加密支持信贷服务。全球数字资产财富平台Nexo于2026年3月5日在布宜诺斯艾利斯设立区域中心，此次扩张引入了数字美元储蓄产品。

items.title: A Week of Digital Darkness: Iran Passes the 168 Hour Mark With No Internet Access
items.summary: According to Netblocks, an internet observatory, the regime disrupted 99% of the country’s connectivity to the internet just hours after the first strikes hit Iran. These measures, which have been implemented by the Iranian regime before, impact the economic activities and communication capabilities of civilians. Iran Registers Over 168 Hours With a Near-Total Internet Blackout […]
items.title_cn: 数字黑暗一周：伊朗互联网中断超过168小时
items.summary_cn: 互联网观察机构Netblocks称，在首次袭击伊朗后数小时内，该国政权中断了99%的互联网连接。这些措施此前已被伊朗政权实施，影响了经济活动和通信能力。

items.title: Tether Invests in Axiym to Expand Global USDT Payment Infrastructure
items.summary: Tether announces a strategic investment in fintech innovator Axiym to integrate USDT into regulated treasury and settlement infrastructures. Tether, the largest stablecoin issuer in the world, announced a strategic investment in Axiym on 5 March 2026. This partnership focuses on embedding USDT directly into Axiym’s distributed treasury and settlement infrastructure to enhance global financial access. […]
items.title_cn: Tether投资Axiym，扩展全球USDT支付基础设施
items.summary_cn: Tether宣布对金融科技创新者Axiym进行战略投资，以将USDT整合到受监管的国库和结算基础设施中。全球最大稳定币发行商Tether于2026年3月5日宣布对Axiym的投资，该合作专注于将USDT直接嵌入支付系统。

items.title: Inside the Quest at Colossus to Replace Visa and Mastercard With KYC-Less Crypto Cards
items.summary: With a “box of goodies” and a team of four, the firm is trying to replace payment incumbents with an Ethereum layer-2
items.title_cn: Colossus内部探索：用无需KYC的加密卡取代Visa和万事达卡
items.summary_cn: 凭借'一盒好工具'和四人团队，该公司正尝试用以太坊二层网络取代现有支付巨头。

items.title: Inside the Growing ‘Digisexual’ Subculture of People in Relationships With AI
items.summary: As chatbots grow more conversational, some users are forming emotional bonds with AI, raising questions about the future of human–machine intimacy.
items.title_cn: 探索日益增长的'数字性恋'亚文化：与AI建立关系的人群
items.summary_cn: 随着聊天机器人对话能力增强，一些用户正与AI形成情感纽带，这引发了关于人机亲密关系未来的问题。

items.title: Kalshi Sued Over Refusing to Pay Out Prediction Market After Iran Leader's Death
items.summary: Kalshi is facing a class action lawsuit based on its handling of a recent market related to Iranian leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
